title: timeline not syncing to outlook

posts.author: Jo.learning (Jo Flintham)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are trying to get the timeline to sync with outlook. When we set up these integrations … - When an item is created or updated, create an event in outlook and sync future changes from this board ANDWhe a person is assigned to Jo lastname, create an event in outlook and sync future changes from this board . In both of these options It allows me to choose the date column (no issues there) but if the timeline is selected it doesn’t sync with outlook. I can do the column sync with the column settings but this is a new calendar and not a sync to my calendar. Is there a way to have either both the date and timeline sync or just the timeline if we remove the date?

Can someone shine some light on if this can be done and if so how?
